summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals held its first meeting of 2023, approving prior meeting minutes, adopting digital minutes going forward, signing resolutions for two previously approved variances, accepting the 2023 meeting schedule (moving meetings to the fourth Monday), and electing officers for the year. The board also noted openings for two alternate BZA members.
decisions: Approved December 19, 2022 video meeting minutes (with two abstentions)
Approved motion to adopt digital minutes going forward
Approved Resolution R063-2022 (variance for Victoria Rodney Siebel at 6790 Gaynor Road for lot width relief)
Approved Resolution R-002-2023 (area variance for Troy E. Smith at 6676 Wood Street for accessory structure placement)
Accepted 2023 BZA meeting schedule moving meetings to the fourth Monday of each month
Elected Ed Sigla as Chair for 2023
Elected Derek Holmes as Vice Chair for 2023
Appointed Tom Currie as Secretary for 2023
action_items: Harry to present board member term renewals/reappointments to the Board of Trustees
Board members to email Harry with any known schedule conflicts for upcoming meetings
Staff to seek two alternate BZA members to fill open positions
Staff to prepare permits following signing of approved resolutions
notable_topics: Approval of resolutions for two previously decided variance cases
Transition from handwritten to digital meeting minutes
2023 BZA meeting schedule adoption (fourth Monday of each month)
Election of Chair, Vice Chair, and Secretary for 2023
Discussion of quorum challenges and member availability
Openings for two alternate BZA members
Board of Trustees working on revising the township zoning code and resolution language
Zoning workshop process underway for updating land use maps and zoning resolution
notes: The meeting was brief (approximately 30 minutes, adjourning at 7:01 PM). Several members noted upcoming schedule conflicts — Jesse Shaw expected to be absent for the first six months, Derek Holmes out in March. The board discussed that the Board of Trustees has initiated a process to modernize and revise the township zoning resolution, which is expected to take three to four months once direction is finalized. Sean Burke was mentioned as a member whose status is uncertain, and one unnamed member is on leave and may resign, which would move Gary Theodore from alternate to full member.
title: BZA 1-23-23
